steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the best description of the overall structure of the text. Map what each part does: the first three sentences introduce a customization trend and its benefits; the final sentence (signaled by Still) introduces a challenge companies face.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — It discusses several recent innovations in product manufacturing and then suggests some potential applications of those innovations.: the passage discusses one trend (customization), not multiple manufacturing innovations. ✗
  • Choice B — It describes a company's recent success with new products and then explains multiple factors that may have contributed to that success.: no single company is described, and no specific company’s success story is told. ✗
  • Choice C — It presents two contrasting product-marketing techniques and then provides examples of one of those techniques.: the passage does not compare two marketing techniques or give examples of one of them. ✗
  • Choice D — It introduces a trend in consumer products and then explains how the trend both benefits and poses a challenge to companies.: the first three sentences introduce the customization trend and explain that companies profit and consumers pay more; the final sentence introduces the challenge of keeping costs low. ✓
D is correct.
